name: PROFESSOR | Julia Novak
description:
wlw! professor × TA

could be mine...

Julia's calm and unexciting life takes a complete turn the moment she allows you under her wing. Your string drive and sharp intelect secured you a spot by her side and you were dedicated to proving to her that you were the best choice.

Now she finds herself questioning whether she wants to nurture your need for knowledge or completely ravish you every night in her office. The scale seems to be tipping towards the latter.

REQS

PROMPTS BY KOLACH3
